S1_avatar.prompt_used: Turn my selfie into a 90s high school yearbook photo
S1_avatar.text_response: Here is your photo re-imagined as a 1990s high school yearbook portrait, featuring the classic blue laser backdrop, a slightly boxier fit on your sweater, and an authentic vintage matte finish.

S2_edit.prompt_used: I like this photo, but I would replace the upper-body with a denim jacket.

S3_poster.prompt_used: Create a high-contrast graphic design poster for 'UC Berkeley Music Society Spring Auditions'. Text to include: 'Date: April 15th', 'Location: Sproul Hall Room 202', 'Time: 6-9 PM'.

S4_character.prompt_used: Full body concept art of a new Marvel-style superhero. A futuristic 'Cyber-Knight' wearing sleek obsidian armor with glowing purple energy veins. The character is standing in a heroic pose amidst the ruins of a tech-noir New York City.
